Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPLOG3 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; SBYDATE ; N STARTDT,ENDDT,IX,JOB,CNT,LIST,SUB W !!,"*** SEARCH BY DATE ***" W !!,"use NOW for now, M-x for minutes, H-x for hours, D-x for days" ASKSTART ; W !!,"Enter the start date (NOW): " R ANS S ANS=$$LOW^XLFSTR(ANS) I ANS=""!(ANS="now") S STARTDT=$$NOW^XLFDT() W "NOW" G ASKEND I ANS["m-" S STARTDT=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT(),0,0,-$E(ANS,3,$L(ANS)),0) G ASKEND I ANS["h-" S STARTDT=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT(),0,-$E(ANS,3,$L(ANS)),0,0) G ASKEND I ANS["d-" S STARTDT=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT(),-$E(ANS,3,$L(ANS)),0,0,0) G ASKEND I ANS="^" G SEARCH^DVPLOG2 G ASKSTART ASKEND ; W !!,"Enter the end date (M-5): " R ANS S ANS=$$LOW^XLFSTR(ANS) I ANS="" S ENDDT=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT(),0,0,-5,0) W "M-5" G DOSEARCH I ANS["m-" S ENDDT=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT(),0,0,-$E(ANS,3,$L(ANS)),0) G DOSEARCH I ANS["h-" S ENDDT=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT(),0,-$E(ANS,3,$L(ANS)),0,0) G DOSEARCH I ANS["d-" S ENDDT=$$FMADD^XLFDT($$NOW^XLFDT(),-$E(ANS,3,$L(ANS)),0,0,0) G DOSEARCH I ANS="^" G SEARCH^DVPLOG2 G ASKEND DOSEARCH ; W !!,"---------------------------------------------------------" W !,"SEARCH RESULT" W !,"---------------------------------------------------------" W !," Date Time Routine",! S IX=ENDDT,CNT=0 F S IX=$O(^DVPLOG("A",IX)) Q:IX>=STARTDT!(IX="") D . S JOB="" F S JOB=$O(^DVPLOG("A",IX,JOB)) Q:JOB="" D . . S LDATE=$TR($$FMTE^XLFDT(IX,7),"/","-"),CNT=CNT+1,LIST(CNT)=IX_U_JOB_U_LDATE . . W !,CNT,?4,$P(LDATE,"@"),?19,$P(LDATE,"@",2),?32,^DVPLOG("A",IX,JOB,"CAT") R !!,"Select an item: ",ANS I ANS=""!(ANS="^") G SEARCH^DVPLOG2 I +ANS>0,+ANS<CNT+1 D . S SUB="^DVPLOG(""A"","_$P(LIST(+ANS),U)_","_$P(LIST(+ANS),U,2)_")" . W !!,"Date: ",?20,$P($P(LIST(+ANS),U,3),"@") . W !,"Time: ",?20,$P($P(LIST(+ANS),U,3),"@",2) . W !,"Routine: ",?20,@SUB@("CAT") . W !,"DVP version:",?20,@SUB@(0) . W !!,"What do you want to see ?" XMENU ; S CURMENU="MEXPAND" D DISPMENU^DVPLOG2(CURMENU) Q
